name: Snap-start
description: 用 Pixabay 高清美图作为 Chrome 新标签页起始页，每次打开随机展示一张图片。

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://pixabay.com; img-src 'self' data: https://cdn.pixabay.com https://pixabay.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com
